title: Algerian Chicken Tagine
description: A classic North African dish made with slow-cooked chicken in a flavorful tagine stew.

ingredients.name: algerian spice blend
ingredients.notes: or 1 tsp ground cinnamon, 1 tsp ground ginger, 1 tsp ground cumin

instructions: Heat oil in the bottom of a clay or ceramic tagine over medium heat.
Brown chicken thighs, then set aside.
Add more oil if necessary and cook carrots until tender.
Add spices and cook for 1 minute.
Add wine and bring to a boil.
Return chicken to the pot and cover.
Simmer over low heat for 20-25 minutes or until chicken is cooked through.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot over couscous or rice.
